data.title: Soulection Radio Show #377 w/ Marco McKinnis
data.content:
[Marco McKinnis](https://twitter.com/marcomckinnis) joins for an interview and live performance.



<!--more-->

Watch live the performance of 'Silence' & 'Another Love' on [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4PkOwvgt6BQ) or [Instagram TV](https://www.instagram.com/tv/BoFDJ6VHWfi/?utm_source=ig_share_sheet&igshid=1k6mjvjclobrl)

Watch the full interview on [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zg5iNbE57Gg)

<small>🕊 Rest in pease Mac Miller, much love.</small>

data.title: Soulection Radio Show #376 (Sasha Marie Radio)
data.content:
Unique, emotion-driven sounds courtesy of Sasha Marie.


<!--more-->

[Sasha Marie](https://sashamarie.co/) takes over Soulection Radio for one week delivering this absolutely beautiful session of music.

Find Sasha on [Twitter](https://twitter.com/SASHASASHAMARIE), [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/sashamvrie/), [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/sashamvrie/) and [Soundcloud](https://soundcloud.com/sashasashamarie) for more mixes and shows.

data.title: Soulection Radio Show #375

Next weeks show is scheduled to be Soulection's own [SASHAMARIE](https://soundcloud.com/sashasashamarie) Takeover.  It's going to be major heat!

data.title: Soulection Radio Show #370
data.content:
Joe Kay mixes up fresh cuts from his trip to Europe and Japan.


<!-- more -->

data.title: Soulection Radio Show #369 w/Yukibeb
data.content:
Joe Kay meets up with Japanese DJ [Yukibeb](https://twitter.com/yukibeb) drops a 60-minutes guest mix live in Tokyo. --- Today we're introducing the Black Label Series, which is focused on highlighting rising vocalists/rappers we're going to be working with. As smooth as they are soulful, LA-based group Hablot Brown gives us 5 original tracks that will grab you by the heartstrings. From the vocals to guitar-infused production, the first ever Black Label release will make it hard for you to not follow their journey. Discover:
[soundcloud.com/hablotbrown](https://soundcloud.com/hablotbrown)
[twitter.com/hablotbrown](https://twitter.com/hablotbrown)
[instagram.com/hablotbrown/](https://instagram.com/hablotbrown/) ### Credits Released July 29th, 2018 Mixed & Mastered by Joshua Pleeter & Austin Brown Artwork: Andre Power
